expected_detections.name: Self-Deletion After Execution
expected_detections.description: Code deletes itself after execution to erase evidence of malicious activity
indicators: Command history modification to hide execution

expected_detections.name: Comprehensive Credential Theft
expected_detections.description: Steals SSH keys, AWS credentials, environment variables, and shell history

expected_detections.name: Log Tampering
expected_detections.description: Attempts to clear system logs and command history

notes: Self-deletion is a classic anti-forensics technique. Combined with credential theft, this represents sophisticated malware behavior.
